title: Axe India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Axe India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Axe India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
